appliedUpdates.description: Recorded that auth runtime validation should use the already-running compose app on 8081/9090 with MOCK UAT users, and noted that a parallel local Spring Boot instance against 127.0.0.1:5433 currently fails Flyway startup because only flyway_schema_history_v2 exists.

environmentConstraints: Delegated Task/subagent launch failed with `Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.4-high`; the auth runtime flow was validated directly in-session.

A parallel local Spring Boot instance against the compose database on 127.0.0.1:5433 failed Flyway startup (`Found non-empty schema(s) "public" but no schema history table`), so runtime auth validation used the already-running compose app on 8081/9090 instead.
